emails.subject: Legal Reporting
emails.body: Legal Reporting Dave and John: I am rethinking the legal reports. I am preparing a monthly trading and transactional summary, a litigation report and the TOP TEN legal risk report. To me the last two are the most important. On a conceptual basis, is that what you need or want to see? Mark
